titleStmt.title: SII 34.177: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 177. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the east wall of the first prākāra of the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga I, 36th year, Rh;shabha, sudi 3, Saturday, Rōhiṇī = A.D. 1106, May 5, Saturday. (tithi is wrong).

Gift of land for the sacred bath of the deity in the temple Tiruvāḻpōkkimalai-Mahādēva in Kuṟunāgaṉ-nāḍu, a unit of Rājamahēndra-vaḷanāḍu. The donor, a merchant of Śivapādaśēkhara-puram, purchased it from the sabhā of Kuḻittaṇḍalai, a brahmadēya in Mīkōṭṭu-nāḍu. It is said that the sold land had been lying fallow without owners and hence added to the village common.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOrājakEcari panmarāṉa cakravattikaḷ śrīkulOttuṅka cOḻatEvaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 6 Āvatu rājamahentira vaḷanāṭṭu mīkOṭṭu nāṭṭu brahmadeyam kuḻittaṇṭalai peru
ṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm Ivvāṭṭai ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu purvapakṣattu tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyun tritiyaiyum peṟṟa rōcaṇi nāḷ Ivvūr naṭuvil tirumuṟṟattu rājēndracōḻaṉ tirumaṇṭapattē dhanmi ceytu kūṭṭa kuṟai
varak kūṭiyiruntu Innāṭṭuk kuṟunākaṉ nāṭṭut tiruvāḷpōkkimalai mahādevarkku tirumañcaṇappuṟamāka Innāṭṭu civapātacēkarapurattu Irukkum viyāpaāri peruñcuṉaiyūruṭaiyāṉ veṇkāṭaṉ
kku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ik kuḻittaṇṭalaippulattu tirunārāyaṇa kiḻakku Arumoḻitēva vākkālukku teṟkku 1 kaṇṇāṟṟu 4 catirattu kamutuvaṉ nārāyaṇan ciṅkam � mūṉṟumā 1kāṇi � In
nilam Āṟumākkāṇikkīḻ Iraṇṭumāvarai kāṇiyum Aimpatiṟṟāṇṭin vatcuram Uṭaiyārinṟiyē ki yāy sabhainōkkāyk kiṭan=tamaiyil Innilam viṟṟukkuṭuttu Ittēvar kōyillil śaṇṭēśvaratē
var śrīhastattāl pōka Iṭaṟpaṭa kaḻañcu Innilattukku Iṟaikāval nāṅkaḷē Iṟai Iṟukka kaṭavōmāka Iṟaikāvalākak koṇṭa pon 5 pe kuṉṟiyum Āka pon Ayṅkaḻañcaraiyē
kunṟiyum koṇṭu Innilam Ā mā varaikkāṇiyumā kaḷē Iṟai Iṟukka kaṭavōmāka viṟṟukkuṭuttōm tiruvāṭpōkkimalai mahādevarkku
peruṅkuṟi[ mahā sabhaiyōm Ippaṭi] caṅkaranārāyaṇan cainta nā kalivicaiyan cāttan caṅkaranārāyaṇa vācciyan nārāyaṇa nārāyaṇanārum kācipan piramaṇaṉ tēvan mā�
rum ma vanavāsa torup paṇipaṇiyāl vāṭṭu Ippiramāṇam Eḻutinēṉ Ivvūr matyastaṉ nārāyaṇan śrīkaṇṭanēn Ivai Enneḻuttu panmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
